title: Wanaka Heavy Rain
lead: Wanaka is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.00, indicating a significant anomaly. This event has a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The heavy rain in Wanaka is expected to continue, with high humidity levels at 95%. 
 The current wind speed is 0.8 km/h, which is relatively low. 
 The HDD value is 11.5 GG, while the CDD value is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Wanaka.
